starter_conflicts.title: Ward-stone failing
starter_conflicts.conflict: An old ward-stone nearby is failing; it emits a thin keening sound and draws a hungry shape pacing just beyond the drift. Noise will make this harder.
starter_conflicts.hook: The stone’s runes are chipped, but one line is freshly scraped clean.

starter_conflicts.title: Wounded courier
starter_conflicts.conflict: A a ration-runner stumbles into view and collapses, clutching a sealed note; without help they won’t last long.
starter_conflicts.hook: a half-buried supply sled with its harness cut clean

starter_conflicts.title: Unstable passage
starter_conflicts.conflict: A cracked lintel shifts overhead; one shove or tremor could collapse the passage and trap someone. A quick, careful move could turn it in your favor.
starter_conflicts.hook: Dust falls in steady grains—this has been moving for a while.

starter_conflicts.title: Weather clock
starter_conflicts.conflict: needle-snow that blinds—your visibility and footing are degrading fast, and you need shelter or a safer route within minutes. A quick, careful move could turn it in your favor.
starter_conflicts.hook: A narrow path of steadier ground is visible if you commit to it.

starter_conflicts.title: Scavengers deciding
starter_conflicts.conflict: A small scavenger band has spotted you from cover; they’re deciding whether to rush you or bargain.
starter_conflicts.hook: You catch a flash of a hand-signal—organized, but scared.

starter_conflicts.title: Crossing hazard
starter_conflicts.conflict: A crossing ahead is turning dangerous: the waterline is rising and the footing is failing.
starter_conflicts.hook: a strip of waxed cloth marked with tally cuts and a single word: RETURN

starter_conflicts.title: Gear slip
starter_conflicts.conflict: A strap gives way and a piece of gear slides toward a hazard—lose it or risk yourself to catch it. If you hesitate, the situation worsens on its own.
starter_conflicts.hook: The strap looks cut, not snapped.

starter_conflicts.title: Fouled water
starter_conflicts.conflict: Your nearest water source is fouled—drink it and pay later, or go thirsty and lose time.
starter_conflicts.hook: a knot of rope already set around a boulder, as if someone expected you

starter_conflicts.title: Signal lure

starter_conflicts.hook: Each time it stops, the silence feels heavier.

starter_conflicts.title: Sealed cache

starter_conflicts.hook: Someone tried to pry it already and failed.

starter_conflicts.title: Ward-stone failing
